ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was created */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this tweet is replying to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user this tweet is replying to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geo location data for the tweet */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the tweet */,
  "place_id" TEXT /* ID of the place where the tweet was sent */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "is_quote_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a quote */,
  "quoted_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score of the tweet */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Calculated engagement score based on likes, retweets, and replies */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tweet belongs to */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_of_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet if it is a retweet */,
  "quote_of_id" TEXT /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "source_platform" TEXT /* Platform where the tweet was posted (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_in_reply_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_in_reply_to_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_status_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL in the user's profile */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends (following) the user has */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is listed in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets the user has favorited */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last time the user was active */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "profile_views" INTEGER /* Number of times the user's profile has been viewed */,
  "total_tweets" INTEGER /* Total number of tweets the user has posted */,
  "total_followers" INTEGER /* Total number of followers the user has */,
  "total_following" INTEGER /* Total number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Calculated score based on the frequency of the hashtag's use */,
  "first_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag has been used in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* Short URL in the tweet */,
  "expanded_url" TEXT /* Expanded URL */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the URL has been clicked */,
  "first_clicked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the URL was first clicked */,
  "last_clicked_at" TEXT /* Date and time the URL was last clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "tweet_url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-URL relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the URL in the tweet has been clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_urls_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the place */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the place is located */,
  "place_type" TEXT /* Type of place (e.g., city, neighborhood) */,
  "bounding_box" TEXT /* Bounding box coordinates of the place */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the place */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media item */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "display_url" TEXT /* Display URL of the media item */,
  "expanded_url" TEXT /* Expanded URL of the media item */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the media has been viewed */,
  "first_viewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media was first viewed */,
  "last_viewed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media was last viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_media" (
  "tweet_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-media relationship */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media item */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the media in the tweet has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_media_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
